name: Gengen-Wer
description: Gengen-Wer or Negeg-Wer (Ngg wr) is an Ancient Egyptian god of creation who appeared like a goose, possibly an Egyptian goose.[1] His name can translate to great honker or great cackler. He is said to guard a celestial egg containing a powerful creative energy.[1] He also played a minor role in one spell in Chapter 59 of the Book of the Dead.[2][unreliable source?]
